text_block.headline: BIENVENIDO
text_block.body:
Disfruta al máximo de tu visita a Maldivas alojándote en Compass Resort. Experimenta la impresionante belleza de las islas y disfruta del mimado de clase mundial que Compass Resort ofrece.

Ya sea que viajes en pareja, solo o con otros, Compass ofrece comodidades para satisfacer a todos. Estamos emocionados de tenerte como huésped y sabemos que tu estancia será inolvidable.

card.headline: VILLAS DE LA LAGUNA
card.body:
Escápate al paraíso con nuestras lujosas villas sobre la laguna. Anidadas sobre aguas cristalinas, nuestras villas ofrecen impresionantes vistas de la laguna turquesa circundante y la vibrante vida marina debajo.

Disfruta de la máxima relajación mientras tomas el sol en tu terraza privada o te sumerges en las cálidas aguas justo afuera de tu puerta. Cada villa está elegantemente diseñada con comodidades modernas e interiores espaciosos, asegurando una estancia cómoda e inolvidable.

card.headline: VILLAS DE PLAYA
card.body:
Relájate en nuestras villas de playa. Situadas a lo largo de las playas de arena blanca prístina y aguas turquesas cristalinas, nuestras villas de playa ofrecen la combinación perfecta de lujo y comodidad.

Cada villa cuenta con una amplia sala de estar, terraza privada con tumbonas y acceso directo a la playa. Relájate y desconecta mientras disfrutas de las impresionantes vistas del Océano Índico y sientes la suave brisa marina en tu piel.

text_and_image.headline: LAS VILLAS
text_and_image.body: Escápate al paraíso, donde aguas cristalinas, playas de arena blanca y lujosos bungalows sobre el agua te esperan. Disfruta de la relajación y la aventura en este oasis tropical.

description.en:
Immerse yourself in the stunning natural beauty of the Maldives as you explore the diverse marine life and exotic wildlife that call this tropical paradise home.

Your wildlife tour package includes guided snorkeling and diving excursions to discover the vibrant coral reefs and colorful fish species that thrive in the crystal-clear waters of the Maldives. Swim alongside majestic sea turtles, playful dolphins, and graceful manta rays as you explore the underwater world of the Indian Ocean.

In addition to marine life encounters, you will also have the opportunity to explore the lush tropical forests and mangrove swamps of the Maldives on guided nature walks and boat tours. Keep your eyes peeled for rare bird species, elusive reptiles, and other fascinating wildlife that inhabit the islands.

After a day of wildlife exploration, unwind in luxury accommodations at our resort, complete with world-class amenities, gourmet dining options, and breathtaking views of the turquoise waters. Indulge in spa treatments, sunset cruises, and other leisure activities to complete your wildlife tour experience in the Maldives.

custom_data.brief_description: Immerse yourself in the stunning natural beauty of the Maldives with guided snorkeling, diving excursions, and wildlife encounters. Explore vibrant coral reefs, swim with sea turtles and dolphins, and discover exotic wildlife on nature walks and boat tours.

description.en:
Indulge in the ultimate romantic getaway with your loved one, surrounded by crystal clear waters, white sandy beaches, and stunning overwater bungalows.

Upon arrival, you will be greeted with a welcome drink and a personal concierge to assist you throughout your stay. Relax and unwind in your private overwater villa, complete with a spacious bedroom, outdoor shower, and a private deck with direct access to the ocean.

Start your days with a delicious breakfast served in the privacy of your villa or at our beachfront restaurant. Enjoy a range of activities together, from snorkeling in the vibrant coral reefs to sunset cruises on a traditional Maldivian dhoni. Pamper yourselves with a couples massage at our world-class spa, or simply lounge by the infinity pool with a cocktail in hand.

In the evenings, savor a romantic candlelit dinner under the stars on the beach, featuring a gourmet menu of fresh seafood and international cuisine. End the night with a moonlit stroll along the beach, listening to the gentle lapping of the waves and feeling the warm ocean breeze.

This luxurious couples retreat package includes all meals, a bottle of champagne upon arrival, daily activities, and a special turndown service with chocolates and rose petals. Let us create unforgettable memories for you and your partner in the idyllic setting of the Maldives.

custom_data.brief_description: Escape to a romantic overwater bungalow in the Maldives for a luxurious getaway with your loved one. Enjoy a welcome drink, personal concierge, private villa with ocean access, breakfast in bed, spa treatments, and candlelit dinners on the beach. All-inclusive package includes meals, champagne, daily activities, and turndown service.

description.en:
Our wedding package includes everything you need to create the perfect romantic celebration in paradise.

Upon arrival, you and your guests will be greeted with a welcome drink and a traditional Maldivian ceremony to kick off the festivities. You will have exclusive use of our beautiful beachfront wedding venue, where you can exchange vows with the crystal-clear ocean as your backdrop.

Our dedicated wedding planner will work with you every step of the way to ensure that your special day is flawless. From arranging the ceremony setup and floral arrangements to coordinating the reception and entertainment, we will take care of all the details so you can relax and enjoy the moment.

After the ceremony, you and your guests can indulge in a delicious wedding banquet featuring gourmet cuisine and fine wines. Dance the night away under the stars with a live band or DJ, or opt for a more intimate celebration with a private dinner on the beach.

As newlyweds, you will retreat to a luxurious overwater villa for a romantic honeymoon getaway. Wake up to stunning views of the ocean, enjoy breakfast in bed, and pamper yourselves with a couples' spa treatment. Our resort offers a range of activities and excursions for you to enjoy during your stay, from snorkeling and diving to sunset cruises and beach picnics.

custom_data.brief_description: Our wedding package includes a traditional Maldivian ceremony, exclusive beachfront venue, dedicated planner, gourmet banquet, and luxurious honeymoon villa. Enjoy a flawless celebration in paradise with all the details taken care of for you.

agent.code:
La vida en el Pueblo Tranquilo

Adéntrate en un mundo donde el tiempo se ralentiza y el abrazo de la naturaleza está siempre presente. Nuestros pueblos ofrecen un escape sereno del ajetreo urbano, brindando un vistazo a una forma de vida más simple y conectada.

Experimenta un espíritu comunitario genuino, deléitate con productos frescos y locales, y explora paisajes pintorescos que inspiran tranquilidad. Cada rincón cuenta una historia de tradición, resiliencia y la belleza de la vida rural.

text_block.headline: BIENVENIDA
text_block.body: Bienvenido a nuestro lujoso paraíso fiyiano, donde aguas turquesas, arenas doradas y cálida hospitalidad isleña esperan para hacer de su estadía inolvidable.

card.headline: VILLAS DE LAGUNA
card.body: Nuestras lujosas villas en laguna en Fiji ofrecen un escape exquisito, con terrazas privadas, vistas impresionantes y acceso directo a aguas cristalinas y serenas.

card.headline: VILLAS DE PLAYA
card.body: Experimenta lo último en relajación en nuestras villas de playa, donde los suaves sonidos de las olas y el acceso directo a la playa crean un santuario tropical perfecto en Fiji.

text_and_image.headline: LAS VILLAS
text_and_image.body: Escapa a nuestras villas junto al mar, donde las vistas panorámicas y el relajante sonido de las olas crean un refugio idílico para la tranquilidad y el lujo.

description.en:
Escape to paradise with a day of sailing at our luxurious resort in the Maldives. Set sail on the crystal-clear waters of the Indian Ocean aboard a private yacht, where you can soak up the sun, feel the gentle sea breeze on your face, and admire the stunning views of the surrounding islands.

Our experienced captain will guide you to the best spots for snorkeling, swimming, and sunbathing, allowing you to explore the vibrant marine life and colorful coral reefs that the Maldives are famous for. Enjoy a delicious lunch served on board, featuring fresh seafood and tropical fruits, as you relax and unwind in this idyllic setting.

Whether you're looking for a romantic getaway, a family adventure, or a solo escape, a day of sailing at our resort in the Maldives promises to be an unforgettable experience.

custom_data.brief_description: Spend the day sailing, snorkeling, and swimming on a private yacht. Our experienced captain will be your guide for an unforgettable adventure.

description.en: Indulge in a romantic getaway with our exclusive drink package for two. Enjoy a selection of premium wines, champagne, and cocktails as you relax in the stunning tropical paradise of the Maldives. Sip on your favorite drinks while taking in breathtaking views of the crystal-clear waters and pristine white sandy beaches. Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or simply looking to unwind with your loved one, our drink package for two is the perfect addition to your luxury vacation at Red Panda Resort. Cheers to unforgettable moments and unforgettable memories in paradise.

custom_data.brief_description: Indulge in a romantic getaway with our exclusive drink package for two. Enjoy a selection of premium wines, champagne, and cocktails as you relax in the stunning tropical paradise of the Maldives.
